overview.description: Enterprise print management, test automation, and employee experience platform
overview.description_long: Y Soft Corporation is a global technology company founded in Brno, Czech Republic in 2000. Its core product SAFEQ is a next-generation printing and scanning platform used by 31,000+ organizations across 190+ countries, including 38% of the Global Fortune 500. Beyond print management, Y Soft builds AIVA (AI-assisted automated software and device testing), Clerbo (digital employee experience platform), in-house manufactured hardware (card readers, edge devices), and BE3D (3D printing solution). The company operates a venture arm (Y Soft Ventures) that invests in innovative technology startups.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2000 as part of a student project at Masaryk University in Brno, Czech Republic. After developing the first card-based print authentication system, Y Soft found its market niche in secure print management.

key_milestones.event: Founded at Masaryk University, Brno; developed first card-authenticated print access system
Established offices in Japan and Israel; acquired XpertImage, opening key US office in Dallas
Set up Y Soft Ventures venture capital arm; won CzechInvest Investor of the Year
Launched YSoft SAFEQ 6 as a full platform with document capture and 3D print management
Outlined Cloud First strategy; launched AIVA robotic testing from YSoft Labs
Acquired EveryonePrint (Denmark), a cloud print software provider; launched SAFEQ Cloud and AIVA
Rebranded YSoft SAFEQ Cloud; received ISO 27001:2013 re-certification; won 2023 HPWS Agility Award
Secured €30 million venture debt from European Investment Bank (EIB) for R&D; ISO 9001:2015 certification for manufacturing
Celebrated 25th anniversary; launched SAFEQ Cloud Pro and SAFEQ Cloud Breeze portfolio

leadership.name: Václav Muchna
leadership.role: Global CEO & Chairman of the Board

awards: 2023 HP Developer Partner Conference Best MPS Innovation Award
2022 HP Developer Partner Conference Cloud Print Management Solution of the Year
2021 HP Developer Partner Conference PrintIT Award for Mobility
CzechInvest Investor of the Year 2013 (IT and Shared Services category)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Y Soft's SAFEQ print management has deep hardware integrations and enterprise deployment lock-in that is hard to replicate with generic AI. However, AIVA's test automation capability faces commoditization risk from AI-native testing tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, AI-powered QA platforms). The hardware manufacturing business provides a moat, but cloud print management increasingly faces competition from Microsoft/Google native solutions.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Print management is a mature but stable enterprise market with 31,000+ paying customers in 190+ countries and 38% of Global Fortune 500. The diversification into AIVA (test automation), Clerbo (HR tech), and cloud-first strategy reduces single-market dependency. Long-established customer relationships (25 years) provide resilience.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Y Soft is 25 years old, bootstrapped/founder-owned, with €30 million EIB venture debt secured in 2024 for R&D, suggesting creditworthiness. As a profitable (presumed) enterprise software company with 31,000+ customers, revenue risk is low.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Despite some commoditization risk in test automation, Y Soft's 25-year history, hardware manufacturing moat, deep enterprise integrations, large global customer base, and EIB-backed R&D investment make it a low-risk employer for technologists in the Czech market.

metadata.notes: HQ is in Brno, Czech Republic (not Prague), but Y Soft maintains a Prague office. Founded 2000 as student project at Masaryk University. €30M EIB venture debt converted from EUR at ~1.09 USD/EUR exchange rate. Employee count of 383 from LinkedIn. Company has a ventures arm (Y Soft Ventures) that has made notable investments/exits (e.g., Sewio, NenoVision, VRgineers).
